S.FORM: River Alexander kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, River Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
River Alexander kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, River Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ri*er alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ri*er alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
